title: Flow of Constructor Calls Using 'super' in Java Inheritance
description: This flowchart illustrates the implicit and explicit use of the 'super' keyword to call a parent class constructor from a child class constructor, demonstrating the chain of execution.
relationships: The Child Class Constructor implicitly or explicitly calls `super()` to invoke the Parent Class Constructor
The Parent Class Constructor implicitly calls `super()` to invoke the Object Class Constructor
Execution flows up the inheritance chain before completing the child constructor
